title: DIY-LAOESE Paint Your Own Dog Lamp Kit, Art Supplies Painting Crafts Kit for Kids, Dog Gifts for Girls Age 6-12, Boys and Girls Toys Craft, Christmas Birthday Gift for Kids 6 7 8 9 10 11 12+
features: PAINT AND CREATE YOUR OWN DOG LAMP KIT: The craft set includes a dog lamp, 12 paint pots, 2 brushes, 1 palette, and 1 apron. Great value for educational colouring toys suitable for kids ages 6–14, and providing a fun and enriching experience as a complete art kit and part of popular craft kits for kids.

BEST TOYS FOR ALL AGES: Whether you're new to painting or already experienced, this dog painting kit is perfect for kids aged 6–12. Choose your favourite colours, dip your brush, and paint a lamp that reflects your imagination. Also great for adults to join in. They can experience an engaging painting process and relive carefree childhood memories through this fantastic kids’ arts and crafts kit.

UNLEASH & SPARK YOUR CREATIVITY: With this craft kit, kids can unleash their imagination, creating truly unique and stunning designs on the dog lamp. This DIY set also helps children develop fine motor skills, stimulate creativity and imagination, and build self-confidence.

SAFE AND FUN: The tools included in the kids’ crafts are safe and eco-friendly, so boys and girls can play with confidence. Just enjoy parent-child time with these arts & crafts supplies and fun arts and crafts for kids activities.

PERFECT GIFT FOR ALL AGES: Best gift for 6 to 14 year old boys and girls who love to show their talent in crafting and drawing. Perfect gift for Christmas, Halloween, birthdays, Valentine’s Day or other holidays. A wonderful choice for dog gifts for girls and a great arts & crafts project for kids to enjoy.
